issues.description: Missing SearchDeck action details: filter must specify {Land of Wano} OR Whitebeard Pirates type; maxCards should be 1; deckPosition should specify 'top 5 cards'; also missing the 'place rest at bottom in any order' mechanic
SearchDeck filter is empty {kind:'Any'} but text requires filtering by type (Land of Wano OR Whitebeard Pirates)
SearchDeck missing maxCards:1 and missing deckPosition:'top5' to match 'look at 5 cards from top'
TrashFromHand action present but card text says 'trash 1 card from your hand' should occur AFTER deck ordering step, and thenActions is empty—this needs proper sequencing
Missing intermediate step: 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order'—no mechanic to handle reordering remaining 4 cards

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Land of Wano} type card or card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order and trash 1 card from your hand.
